Operations for ECMA objects, arrays, booleans, numbers, strings, functions, comparisons, conversions, exceptions, lexical environments, references, regular expressions, and try-catch macros in JerryScript.


## Files
- **[ecma-array-object.c](ecma-array-object.c.md)**: Operations for creating and defining properties of ECMA array objects, following ECMA-262 standards.
- **[ecma-array-object.h](ecma-array-object.h.md)**: Header file for ECMA array object operations, including creation and property definition functions.
- **[ecma-boolean-object.c](ecma-boolean-object.c.md)**: Implements the creation of ECMA Boolean objects, following the ECMA-262 v5 specification.
- **[ecma-boolean-object.h](ecma-boolean-object.h.md)**: Header file for ECMA Boolean object operations, including a function to create Boolean objects.
- **[ecma-comparison.c](ecma-comparison.c.md)**: Implements ECMA abstract and strict equality, and relational comparison routines.
- **[ecma-comparison.h](ecma-comparison.h.md)**: Declarations for ECMA abstract and strict equality and relational comparison operations.
- **[ecma-conversion.c](ecma-conversion.c.md)**: Implementation of ECMA-defined conversion routines, including operations like ToPrimitive, ToBoolean, and ToNumber.
- **[ecma-conversion.h](ecma-conversion.h.md)**: ECMA conversion routines for type coercion and primitive operations in JerryScript.
- **[ecma-eval.c](ecma-eval.c.md)**: Implements the 'eval' operation for executing code stored in ECMA strings or character buffers.
- **[ecma-eval.h](ecma-eval.h.md)**: Declarations for ECMA script evaluation operations in the JerryScript engine.
- **[ecma-exceptions.c](ecma-exceptions.c.md)**: Functions for creating and raising standard ECMA error objects with optional messages.
- **[ecma-exceptions.h](ecma-exceptions.h.md)**: Defines error types and functions for creating and raising ECMA standard errors.
- **[ecma-function-object.c](ecma-function-object.c.md)**: Operations for ECMA function objects, including creation, call, construct, and property management.
- **[ecma-function-object.h](ecma-function-object.h.md)**: Function object operations for ECMA, including creation, call, and constructor functionalities.
- **[ecma-get-put-value.c](ecma-get-put-value.c.md)**: Implements ECMA GetValue and PutValue operations for lexical environments and object bases.
- **[ecma-lex-env.c](ecma-lex-env.c.md)**: Operations for managing ECMA lexical environments, including initialization, binding, and value retrieval.
- **[ecma-lex-env.h](ecma-lex-env.h.md)**: Header file for operations on ECMA lexical environments, including global environment management.
- **[ecma-number-arithmetic.c](ecma-number-arithmetic.c.md)**: ECMA number arithmetic operations, including remainder calculation per ECMA-262 v5.
- **[ecma-number-arithmetic.h](ecma-number-arithmetic.h.md)**: Declares a function for calculating the remainder of two ECMA numbers.
- **[ecma-number-object.c](ecma-number-object.c.md)**: Implements the creation of ECMA Number objects according to the ECMA-262 specification.
- **[ecma-number-object.h](ecma-number-object.h.md)**: Header file for ECMA number object creation routines in JerryScript.
- **[ecma-objects-arguments.c](ecma-objects-arguments.c.md)**: Implements operations for creating and managing ECMAScript arguments objects as per ECMA-262 v5.
- **[ecma-objects-arguments.h](ecma-objects-arguments.h.md)**: Functions for creating and manipulating ECMAScript arguments objects in JerryScript.
- **[ecma-objects-general.c](ecma-objects-general.c.md)**: Operations for creating, deleting, and defining properties on ECMA objects, following ECMA-262 standards.
- **[ecma-objects-general.h](ecma-objects-general.h.md)**: Declarations for ECMA object operations, including creation, deletion, and property definition functions.
- **[ecma-objects.c](ecma-objects.c.md)**: Operations for ECMA objects, including property management, type validation, and prototype handling.
- **[ecma-objects.h](ecma-objects.h.md)**: Header file for ECMA object operations, including property access and manipulation functions.
- **[ecma-reference.c](ecma-reference.c.md)**: Functions to resolve syntactic references and their values in a lexical environment.
- **[ecma-reference.h](ecma-reference.h.md)**: Declarations for resolving ECMA reference base and value operations.
- **[ecma-regexp-object.c](ecma-regexp-object.c.md)**: Implements operations for ECMA RegExp objects, including parsing flags, initializing properties, and executing matches.
- **[ecma-regexp-object.h](ecma-regexp-object.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for ECMA RegExp object operations and execution context.
- **[ecma-string-object.c](ecma-string-object.c.md)**: Operations for creating and managing ECMA string objects, including property listing and initialization.
- **[ecma-string-object.h](ecma-string-object.h.md)**: Header file for ECMA string object operations, including creation and property name listing functions.
- **[ecma-try-catch-macro.h](ecma-try-catch-macro.h.md)**: Defines macros for try-catch operations and number conversion with exception handling in ECMAScript.
